tests.name: SmsThreadService getThreads should return paginated threads
SmsThreadService getThreads should use default pagination
SmsThreadService getThreads should include customer and last message
SmsThreadService getMessages should return messages and mark thread as read
SmsThreadService getMessages should throw NotFoundException if thread not found
SmsThreadService getMessages should apply pagination to messages
SmsThreadService getMessages should use default limit=50 and offset=0 when not provided
SmsThreadService sendMessage should call Twilio and store twilioSid when configured
SmsThreadService sendMessage should skip Twilio call and log warning in dev when not configured
SmsThreadService sendMessage should throw InternalServerErrorException in production when Twilio not configured
SmsThreadService sendMessage should throw NotFoundException when thread not found
SmsThreadService sendMessage should include tenantId in thread lookup
SmsThreadService sendMessage should include customer in thread lookup for phone decryption
SmsThreadService receiveInbound should create inbound message and increment unreadCount
SmsThreadService receiveInbound should return existing message when twilioSid already processed (idempotency)
SmsThreadService receiveInbound should check duplicate by twilioSid when provided
SmsThreadService receiveInbound should skip idempotency check when twilioSid is absent
SmsThreadService receiveInbound should include tenantId in thread findFirst (multi-tenant isolation)
SmsThreadService receiveInbound should throw NotFoundException when no thread matches phoneHash+tenantId
SmsThreadService getOrCreateThread should return existing thread when found
SmsThreadService getOrCreateThread should create new thread when none exists
SmsThreadService getOrCreateThread should scope thread lookup by tenantId, customerId, and phoneHash
SmsThreadController getThreads should return paginated threads with meta
SmsThreadController getThreads should pass tenantId to service
SmsThreadController getThreads should handle empty thread list
SmsThreadController getThreads should forward undefined limit and offset to service
SmsThreadController getMessages should return paginated messages for thread
SmsThreadController getMessages should pass threadId and pagination to service
SmsThreadController getMessages should throw when service throws NotFoundException
SmsThreadController getMessages should forward undefined limit and offset to service
SmsThreadController sendMessage should send message and return success
SmsThreadController sendMessage should pass tenantId and threadId to service
SmsThreadController sendMessage should throw when service throws NotFoundException
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should enqueue job and return queued=true when auth token absent in dev mode
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should throw InternalServerErrorException in production when token not configured
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should throw UnauthorizedException and increment metric when signature header missing
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should throw UnauthorizedException and increment metric when signature does not match
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should throw UnauthorizedException when same-length signature has wrong content (timingSafeEqual)
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should enqueue job with correct payload when valid Twilio signature
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should not call auth metrics when signature is valid
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should use https protocol when building signature URL
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should enqueue job with undefined twilioSid when MessageSid absent
SmsWebhookController receiveInbound should build URL from protocol, host, and originalUrl for signature check
SmsInboundProcessor process should call receiveInbound with all job data fields
SmsInboundProcessor process should call receiveInbound without twilioSid when absent
SmsInboundProcessor process should propagate errors from receiveInbound
CannedResponseService should be defined
CannedResponseController should be defined
RentriController should be defined
RentriController getEntries should delegate to rentriService.findAllEntries
RentriController getEntry should delegate to rentriService.findOneEntry
RentriController createEntry should delegate to rentriService.createEntry with tenantId and userId
RentriController getCerCodes should delegate to rentriService.getCerCodes
RentriController searchCerCodes should delegate to rentriService.searchCerCodes with query
RentriController getFirs should delegate to firService.findAllFirs
RentriController createFir should delegate to firService.createFir
RentriController updateFirStatus should delegate to firService.updateStatus
RentriController vidimateFir should delegate to firService.vidimateFir
RentriController getTransporters should delegate to rentriService.findAllTransporters
RentriController createTransporter should delegate to rentriService.createTransporter
RentriController getDestinations should delegate to rentriService.findAllDestinations
RentriController createDestination should delegate to rentriService.createDestination
RentriController getDashboard should delegate to rentriService.getDashboard
RentriController getAlerts should delegate to rentriService.getAlerts
RentriController getMudPreview should delegate to mudService.getPreview with parsed year
RentriController exportMud should delegate to mudService.exportCsv
RentriController exportMud should use current year when year not provided
RentriController updateEntry should delegate to rentriService.updateEntry
RentriController getFir should delegate to firService.findOneFir
RentriController updateTransporter should delegate to rentriService.updateTransporter
RentriController updateDestination should delegate to rentriService.updateDestination
RentriController Year parsing in MUD endpoints should parse year string to number in getMudPreview
RentriController Year parsing in MUD endpoints should use default current year when year is empty string
RentriController Query parameter handling should pass query filters to getEntries
RentriController Query parameter handling should pass status filter to getFirs
RentriController Empty/default query handling should handle empty query object for getEntries
RentriController Empty/default query handling should handle empty query object for getFirs
RentriController Controller dependencies should have all three services injected
RentriController Controller dependencies should delegate to correct service for each endpoint group
RentriController HTTP status codes (via endpoint definition) createEntry returns 201 (via HttpCode decorator)
RentriController searchCerCodes query parameter should pass empty string when q is undefined
RentriController searchCerCodes query parameter should pass query string as-is when provided
RentriController Additional controller endpoints should call findOneEntry with correct parameters
RentriController Additional controller endpoints should handle FIR transporter optional fields
RentriController Additional controller endpoints should retrieve all FIRs without status filter
RentriController Additional controller endpoints should handle MUD export without year parameter
MudService should be defined
MudService getPreview should return preview with aggregated data
MudService getPreview should group by CER code
MudService getPreview should identify main destination by highest count
MudService getPreview should handle entries with no destination
MudService getPreview should return empty rows when no entries
MudService getPreview should query correct year range
MudService exportCsv should generate CSV with header and data rows
MudService exportCsv should generate empty CSV (header only) when no entries
MudService exportCsv should handle null destination in CSV
MudService exportCsv should generate multiple rows for multiple CER codes
MudService getPreview destination aggregation should handle ties in destination count (picks last)
MudService getPreview destination aggregation should aggregate FIR count separately from entries
MudService getPreview destination aggregation should use include destination in findMany query
MudService exportCsv formatting should format quantity with 3 decimal places
MudService exportCsv formatting should quote CER description with special characters
MudService exportCsv formatting should handle missing destination name in CSV
MudService getPreview year range should query correct date range for December 31
MudService getPreview year range should query FIR count with same year range
MudService MudService large datasets should handle 1000+ entries with aggregation
MudService getPreview single CER code should handle all entries with same CER code
